summary: Dealer Portal V2 (Kurumsal Portal Dashboard UI) - 5-row layout, PDF menus, new routes and backend endpoints tested successfully

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody>, and <tr> cannot be child of <span>. This is caused by Visual Editor wrapper injecting <span> elements into table structure. Does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: DealerLayoutV2.js correctly implements 5-row structure: row1 (header), row2 (top menu), row3 (user/actions), row4 (sidebar+content), row5 (footer)
All 10 PDF top menu items present: Özet, İlanlar, Sanal Turlar, Mesajlar, Müşteri Yönetimi, Favoriler, Raporlar, Danışman Takibi, Satın Al, Hesabım

All 10 left sidebar menu items present: Ofisim Özet, İlanlarım, Favorilerim, Sepetim, Doping Satın Al, Sahibinden Akademi, Mağaza Sayfam, Mağaza Sayfam Yönetim Paneli, Müşteri Yönetimi, Hesabım, Çıkış Yap
Hesabım submenu panel opens correctly on the right side with all children links
Backend GET /api/dealer/dashboard/navigation-summary returns badges, left_menu, and MOCKED academy modules
Backend GET /api/dealer/virtual-tours returns summary (total/active/draft) and items array
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, all routes accessible)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dealer Portal V2 layout complete. 5-row structure working: header, top menu (10 PDF items), user/actions row, sidebar+content, footer. New routes /dealer/virtual-tours and /dealer/academy working. Backend endpoints GET /api/dealer/dashboard/navigation-summary and GET /api/dealer/virtual-tours return proper data. Academy modules data is MOCKED as per 2B approval.

response_structure.badges: active_listings, total_listings, favorites_total, unread_messages, customers_total, cart_total, announcements_total
response_structure.left_menu: ofisim_ozet, ilanlarim, favorilerim, sepetim, musteri_yonetimi, duyurular

mocked_data_note: Academy modules (academy.modules) in GET /api/dealer/dashboard/navigation-summary are MOCKED as per 2B approval - 3 sample modules with id, title, description, progress, duration_minutes, tag
